vulnerabilities.name: Missing Security Header: strict-transport-security
vulnerabilities.description: The HTTP response is missing the strict-transport-security security header.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Configure your web server to send the strict-transport-security header.

vulnerabilities.name: Missing Security Header: content-security-policy
vulnerabilities.description: The HTTP response is missing the content-security-policy security header.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Configure your web server to send the content-security-policy header.

vulnerabilities.name: Missing Security Header: x-frame-options
vulnerabilities.description: The HTTP response is missing the x-frame-options security header.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Configure your web server to send the x-frame-options header.

vulnerabilities.name: Missing Security Header: x-content-type-options
vulnerabilities.description: The HTTP response is missing the x-content-type-options security header.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Configure your web server to send the x-content-type-options header.

vulnerabilities.name: Missing Security Header: referrer-policy
vulnerabilities.description: The HTTP response is missing the referrer-policy security header.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Configure your web server to send the referrer-policy header.

vulnerabilities.name: Missing Security Header: permissions-policy
vulnerabilities.description: The HTTP response is missing the permissions-policy security header.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Configure your web server to send the permissions-policy header.

vulnerabilities.name: Missing Security Header: x-xss-protection
vulnerabilities.description: The HTTP response is missing the x-xss-protection security header.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Configure your web server to send the x-xss-protection header.

vulnerabilities.name: HTTP Missing Security Headers
vulnerabilities.description: This template searches for missing HTTP security headers. The impact of these missing headers can vary.

vulnerabilities.name: FingerprintHub Technology Fingerprint
vulnerabilities.description: FingerprintHub Technology Fingerprint tests run in nuclei.

vulnerabilities.name: Missing HSTS Header
vulnerabilities.description: The Strict-Transport-Security header is not set, allowing downgrade attacks.

vulnerabilities.name: Missing Content-Security-Policy
vulnerabilities.description: No CSP header detected, increasing XSS attack surface.

vulnerabilities.name: Missing Referrer-Policy
vulnerabilities.description: Browser may leak URL data in Referer headers.
